data.title: China Eastern Airlines to offer 100 million yuan ($14.35 million) in vouchers for global travelers visiting China.
data.description: China Eastern Airlines (CEA) has revealed plans for a significant distribution of consumption vouchers totaling over 100 million yuan ($14.35 million) in 2026. The launch event for the 2026 "Shopping in China" and New Year Consumption Season introduced this initiative, as part of a nationwide campaign to boost consumption. This campaign is a collaboration between China's Ministry of Commerce and the Shanghai Municipal People's Government. The upcoming initiatives will feature special promotions and activities across the country in an effort to stimulate spending.

data.title: Galaxy Digital CEO predicts stablecoin rewards battle loss against banking lobby, compromise expected. Democrats committed to bill.
data.description: The CEO of Galaxy Digital Inc. (NASDAQ: GLXY), Mike Novogratz, expressed on Wednesday that the cryptocurrency sector may need to reach a compromise regarding the contentious stablecoin rewards provision in the market structure bill. During a conversation with Anthony Scaramucci, the founder of SkyBridge Capital, Novogratz mentioned the likelihood of the industry "losing that battle" against the powerful banking lobby. He anticipated that a compromise could be reached where stablecoin companies are permitted to offer reward points for usage, excluding balances. Novogratz also remarked that Democrats are dedicated to the cause. He stated that overall, the bill is deemed beneficial for the industry's progress. For further details, visit a reputable financial news website.
